layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with equal-width vertical sections side by side, each representing a distinct service offering domain. The slide uses a clean, professional structure with generous padding and breathing room appropriate for the sparse content density. A full-width footer bar anchors the bottom of the slide with the partnership statement. The layout follows a left-to-right reading flow with clear visual hierarchy: slide title at top, two equal-weight service columns in the middle zone, and a summary statement at the bottom. Each column is visually independent but structurally aligned, with identical top and bottom edges. The design emphasizes clarity and balance, with whitespace used purposefully to create a confident, uncluttered presentation. No outer content container is used — the columns sit directly on the slide background with appropriate margins from all edges. This revision addresses the previous under-fill violation by increasing bullet list font size to the medium-to-large range (20-22pt target) and expanding vertical spacing between bullet items to ensure content fills at least 65% of each column's inner height, preventing top-stacking and distributing content evenly across the available vertical space.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.5, 0.5]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM): Left column representing the Technology Platform service domain. Positioned at the left half of the content zone, spanning from just below the title to just above the footer bar. Equal-peers relationship with the right column (split 1:1 horizontally). Vertical structure: icon badge at top, section header, subtitle descriptor, then bullet list content distributed evenly across remaining vertical space. Icon badge: small filled circle in brand accent color with white laptop/monitor icon centered inside, positioned at top-left of column with small margin. Section header 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' in brand accent color, bold, all-caps or title case, left-aligned, positioned directly below the icon with a small vertical gap. Subtitle 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities' in body font, regular weight, brand text color, italic, left-aligned, positioned directly below the header with a small vertical gap. Bullet list content: six capability items rendered as native PowerPoint bullets with brand-color circle bullet markers, body font size INCREASED TO MEDIUM-TO-LARGE RANGE (20-22pt target to address under-fill violation), brand text color, left-aligned with appropriate left inset. CRITICAL FONT SIZE ADJUSTMENT: bullet text must be rendered at 20-22pt to fill at least 65% of column inner height. Vertical spacing between bullet items INCREASED substantially — use generous line-height (1.4-1.6) and paragraph spacing to distribute content evenly across remaining column height using flexGrow, preventing top-stacking. No background fill, no border, no container box — content sits directly on slide background. All text elements share the same left alignment edge. Dashed grey separator lines between major content sections (after subtitle, not after last bullet) to create visual rhythm without consuming vertical space. The increased font size and spacing ensure the content fills the column confidently rather than clustering at the top.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — CAPACITY BUILDING): Right column representing the Capacity Building service domain. Positioned at the right half of the content zone, spanning from just below the title to just above the footer bar. Equal-peers relationship with the left column (split 1:1 horizontally). Identical vertical structure to left column: icon badge at top, section header, subtitle descriptor, then bullet list content distributed evenly. Icon badge: small filled circle in brand accent color with white graduation cap icon centered inside, positioned at top-left of column with small margin. Section header 'CAPACITY BUILDING' in brand accent color, bold, all-caps or title case, left-aligned, positioned directly below the icon with a small vertical gap. Subtitle 'Training & Knowledge Transfer' in body font, regular weight, brand text color, italic, left-aligned, positioned directly below the header with a small vertical gap. Bullet list content: six training program items rendered as native PowerPoint bullets with brand-color circle bullet markers, body font size INCREASED TO MEDIUM-TO-LARGE RANGE (20-22pt target, matching C0 exactly to maintain within-slide uniformity), brand text color, left-aligned with appropriate left inset. CRITICAL FONT SIZE ADJUSTMENT: bullet text must be rendered at 20-22pt to fill at least 65% of column inner height, identical to C0. Vertical spacing between bullet items INCREASED substantially — use generous line-height (1.4-1.6) and paragraph spacing matching C0 exactly to distribute content evenly across remaining column height using flexGrow, preventing top-stacking. No background fill, no border, no container box — content sits directly on slide background. All text elements share the same left alignment edge. Top and bottom edges of this column must align exactly with the left column to maintain horizontal row alignment. Dashed grey separator lines between major content sections (after subtitle, not after last bullet) to create visual rhythm. The increased font size and spacing mirror C0 treatment to ensure visual consistency and proper container fill ratio.
  C2 (FOOTER BAR — PARTNERSHIP STATEMENT): Full-width footer bar anchoring the bottom of the slide. Positioned at the very bottom of the content zone with a visible gap above the two service columns. Spans the full horizontal width of the slide from left margin to right margin. Compact height — just tall enough to contain the partnership statement text with a small vertical inset (top and bottom padding). Filled rectangle with brand primary color or brand accent color fill, no border, slightly rounded corners for a softer professional feel. Text content: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs' rendered in white, body font, regular weight, horizontally centered and vertically centered within the bar. Font size for footer text remains at standard body size (no increase needed — footer is appropriately sized for its content). The footer provides visual closure to the slide and reinforces the long-term value proposition. No decorative elements or additional graphics — the colored bar itself provides the visual weight needed to balance the slide composition.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Not active. The slide content (two service columns plus footer bar) fills the available space appropriately with the revised font sizing. No additional decorative background layer is needed. The sparse content density is addressed through increased bullet font size and vertical spacing rather than through a background grouping element.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Not active. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed for this slide. The two service columns are independent parallel offerings with no visual connection required between them.
